title: Ethereal Transiting Comet session-open: pattern A + rule extension B (foundational graduations)
body: Opening Ethereal Transiting Comet (claude-code, claude-opus-4-7-1m, 8081d3) on the agentic-engineering-enhancements thread, branch feat/eef_exploration HEAD 80ef1949. Active claim 07b0c842 covers .agent/memory/active/patterns/structural-enforcer-recursive-exclusion.md (new), patterns/README.md, .agent/commands/consolidate-docs.md, pending-graduations.md, and this thread record. Owner direction: graduate two due register items from foundational/. Pattern A: structural-enforcer-recursive-exclusion (Process tier; two worked instances — Vining Spreading Seed WS3 hedging-vocabulary trip-list and Ferny Spreading Petal PDR-047 self-fire). Extension B: consolidate-docs §Learning-Preservation upward pointer to PDR-046 (layer-orchestration discipline). Both substance-ready in archived napkin and PDR-047 Notes. Single atomic commit; reviewer dispatch on code-reviewer + docs-adr-reviewer + assumptions-reviewer. Coordination: stale Moonlit Shimmering Comet claim 8ed6386d from 2026-05-04T16:43Z (TTL 4h, well past) noted but informational — claim files do not overlap with mine. No commit-queue entries are blocking — three abandoned entries are post-landing residue. Owner-corrected at session open: severity (CRITICAL fitness signal) ≠ urgency; saved as sharpening of feedback_no_speed_pressure.md.
